title: Benchling public API reference
agent_notes: Public API reference for Benchling V2 stable endpoints. This pack selects Benchling-side handoff objects only.

title: Benchling SDK V2 stable service reference
agent_notes: Official SDK docs expose service namespaces for plates, containers, blobs, workflow tasks, workflow outputs, lab automation, events, and tasks.

title: Benchling SDK Lab Automation service
agent_notes: Official SDK docs expose Automation Input Generator and Automation Output Processor operations.

title: Benchling SDK Workflow Task service
agent_notes: Official SDK docs expose workflow task create, list, get, update, copy, archive, and bulk operations.

title: Benchling events reference
agent_notes: Official event docs describe EventBridge payloads and workflow/automation event names. Events can be stale and should be followed by API reads when freshness matters.

title: Benchling and HighRes lab automation handoff post
agent_notes: Public handoff post says Benchling passes structured experiment parameters, sample information, plate barcodes, and plate layout to Cellario OS via API. This pack does not claim Cellario endpoint shape or execution semantics.
